ogTitle: Karana Downs vs Karawatha: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karana Downs and Karawatha.
heading: Karana Downs vs Karawatha — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karana Downs, Queensland and Karawatha, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karana Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Karawatha (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karana Downs or Karawatha safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karana Downs has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Karawatha scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karana Downs scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Karawatha scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karana Downs or Karawatha?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karana Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
